name: wordsexpire
description: A quiet garden where brief notes fade unless others keep them alive.

scripts.db:local: wrangler d1 execute wordsexpire --local --file=schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute wordsexpire --local --file=seed.sql
scripts.db:remote: wrangler d1 execute wordsexpire --remote --file=schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute wordsexpire --remote --file=seed.sql
